column1: Hey Blaise, thanks for your interest in rolling with us at SpringBreak U. Your personal trip rep, Spiffy, will text you in a few to get you squared away with info and details
Liked “Hey Blaise, thanks for your interest in rolling with us at SpringBreak U. Your personal trip rep, Spiffy, will text you in a few to get you squared away with info and details”
What's good! It's Spiffy here with SpringBreak U
Which week is your spring break? I'll send over the options for that week
Bet I got you. which destination were you lookin to book?
Cabo is fire fs! how many ppl in the group so far?
We have 6 are trying to get couple other seniors from some other orgs
okay yea once y'all get going I'm sure everyone else will want to get on board
which school do you all go to?
Dope we've had a couple groups come in from there. will def hook it up!
gonna put the details together for you now, how soon were you lookin to get things planned out?
Everyone is getting antsy because a couple orgs already booked trips
Yeaa I feel that, nows the time for sure to atleast get something secured
We have a payment plan so all of you can reserve and then worry about rest of the payments through the semester
cool if I send most of the details through email? its a little long for text
did you want to look at flights too? most times its a lot cheaper to get those separately on your own
If u can give us both that's cool
okay cool ill look into that rn too
Do you think Cancun is better?
So depends what we're lookin for. Cabo is a lot more expensive, than cancun for sure. If we're tryna save money then yea its def better. its like 300 dollars less
LOL. lets prolly not do Cabo. ill add it in the email anyway. Punta Cana is another good one if interested. thats where I'll be
Well look at whatever you send us
bet that. was trying to figure out flights, I know buffalo is a lot closer for you
Buffalo valid or jfk we all live in Rochester
JFK is a lot cheaper but thats like 5-6 hours away right?
Wait I'm a little slow yeah that's clipped
Lol bro im lookin at the maps like sheesh how would this even work
just sent that over lmk if you got it
Do you send me a link to like help you out or whatever or do I just use the email
I make a link specifically for your group and we use that one. Which option we leaning towards?
Morning bro bet I'll make that right now. 5 nights? And do we want to do the flights through us from Buffalo?
Flights the 19th are the most expensive compared to any other day that week
Is there incentives for how many kids we add on the trip like th off resort package or special party package
Yea let's do 15-20 then. And yea bro I can get you in on our ambassador list where you can earn a free trip depending on how many ppl
The standard number is 15 including yourself. Which you already have 6 so basically halfway there. Should be easy
And we can add them in as time goes on too. We can get you 6 reserved today
bet bet, I'll open up 8 slots for today, if you need 12 lmk. also, you getting flights separately on your own or did you want me to add the flights in?
i'll just do 12 for now btw
Valid that's where I think we're at rn
Bet. I'll set that up rn
yoyo, just sent over the reservation through email, will text it here too
I added the free booze cruise in there too
Loved “I added the free booze cruise in there too”
Could u set up like certain numbered rooms
as in like a room of 4 ppl vs a room of 3 ppl?
Yea bro, rn its 3 rooms of 4 ppl. but what you need?
Tryna figure it out Ik we got two 2s 3 4s Then wanna open 2 more 4s So 5 totals 4s and 2 twos
Wanna give me a copy paste message of the add ons with a price
bet ill adjust that rn. and yea ill type one out for you to send out
your room, gonna be a two or a four?
This mad annoying organizing this my bad it's 6 fours

Add on options - Booze Cruise $79 (included free) | 3 night party pass - comes with express entry, cover charge, and open bar at Cancun top nightclubs like Mandala Beach, The City, and D'Cave $200 | 4 night party pass - $269
booze cruise included free for those hopping in today
So if I get 15 I get a free trip how do I set that up
yea rn you lookin good bro. that gets factored in at the end of the payment plan, just to make sure no one drops out last min
you still make your deposit today, and keep up with the payment plan through the semester, then you get reimbursed the total of your trip at the end
Liked “you still make your deposit today, and keep up with the payment plan through the semester, then you get reimbursed the total of your trip at the end”
Can you remove the 5 night party package it has that and the 3 night on mine
yea ill check rn, did you add it in on accident?
How does the shuttling from resort to airport work

Yoo! so once you get your flight info all set you enter that into your account. our ops team then takes that and schedules your transportation based on your flight. when you land theyll be there ready for you
Is this per room or as a group?
per person. each person enters their own flight info
What times would we check-in and check out
typically 4p and 11a but, if rooms are avail when you arrive you'll be able to check right in. if they arent youre still able to use the resort - eat, drink, pool etc until your room is ready
Could we eat drink pool etc if flight leaves later the 20th
yea you'll just have to check out of your room and bring your bags down to lobby with the hotel staff
what time is the flight youre lookin at
Tried to do late the 20th so we have the whole day
word I feel you. 7pm is cool. we usually get ppl to the airport early so they have enough time to get situated. youll prolly leave the resort around 4
yoyo! sup bro. ops team hmu about your reservation. theres a few people without payments, it was Moorea, Neven. then we had some empty slots
what happened to him tho! just cant make it?
None of his boys wanted to go
Oh damn. Were those the ppl that were supposed to hop in the last 2 rooms?

I'm pretty sure I sent the trip to a couple orgs and a lot of people were just on the fence dragging their feet Jake Marcel and sophie rodger wanna go Ivan west and Riley Yasso room bc those kids backed out
Word so Ava Franks isnt going anymore either?
Just mo these girls are being annoying my bad
lol all good bro. so Mo is or isnt going?
Actually can you leave jake marcell and sophie rodger in there room with Ava. They found out they might have to share a bed it's saying 2 beds arnt promised

okay bet so leave them where they are? and yea its just a heads up in the situation where the resort doesnt have any double beds at the time of check in. it happens very rarely, but we like to let everyone know about the slight possibility so there isnt any surprises
Some girl looked up shit on TikTok and they were all tweaking

Liked “okay bet so leave them where they are? and yea its just a heads up in the situation where the resort doesnt have any double beds at the time of check in. it happens very rarely, but we like to let everyone know about the slight possibility so there isnt any surprises”
yeoo whats good brodie! we got a empty room on your reservation that ops team wants to move to a diff res. you plan on having more ppl hop in or nah
blaise whats good bro, checkin in on the rest of the group's status
My bad I didn't see that other message
I don't think anyone else is going on the trip let me just triple check the rooms but I think everything's good
Mo definitely needs to be removed
yoyo, so we all good with who we have on the res as of now? just gotta close the open slots down. if anyone hits you back and wants to tap in, we can open up what we need based on what we have left
we got 13 ppl active as of rn
yo bro real quick! we do got an odd number rn so some rooms may have to go to a 3 person room which will cost a little more for the ppl in those rooms. lmk what you want to do with it
ideally, if you can get 3 more ppl, youll be golden and no one will have to pay more than the original pricing
yoyo, you cool with some rooms going down to a 3 person room?
Marcel Ava and sophie are a 3
And Ivan and Riley are going to be a 2
Someone asked this Do you know if anything actually happens if we don’t pay all of Cancun by the last day? It says you’re subject to cancellation but do yk it that will actually happen
It could I don't really have control over that
Who was it and how much time did they need? Just so we can get ahead of it now
I asked it I believe it was some of the girls like Ava franks
Aight I just need to know exactly what's up if they're lookin for help
I think it’s just me, if I could go into like mid January that would be super helpful. But if it’s not in their control and they don’t recommend chancing it I won’t
yoo. Got you, mid jan will be tough, especially since shes lowkey way behind by two payments rn
I can email her directly to figure out something that works
Or she can shoot me a text
I ss and send it to her
And then yo will Ivan and Riley be cool with paying the 2 person room price? Its a little more expensive
yoyo just a heads up we got Lianna. Kelly, and Riley behind on payments. might wanna tell them to lock in if they still plan on goin
Liked “yoyo just a heads up we got Lianna. Kelly, and Riley behind on payments. might wanna tell them to lock in if they still plan on goin”
yerr whats good brotha. Lianna still running behind on payments, just dont want her to end up getting removed from ops. She still plan on going?
Yo dude think Its to late to add trip insurance
yoyo, it may be bro. why, did you need to cancel?
Not cancel but just in case with trump going to war with the cartels
Could see the whole thing for everyone getting cancelled
Yo imma stay on the resort if we can even go is there anyway I can get the 300 from party package back?
Yo! yea we can work on that bro

At the moment all hotels and airlines are operating as normal. most of whats happened is in other parts of Mexico and not in the hotel zone where our resorts and events are. Cancun tourism areas are heavily secured
I was just reading it's starting all over after they shot that cartel boss but definitely wanna drop the party package
yeaa it was out in Jalisco which is 2k miles from Cancun
but I feel you bro, I can delete that if you want
Maybe just change it to a one night idk instead of three in case things are getting better
It's mostly social media I think but a lot of crazy shit happening all over
word bro wanna just lmk what you wanna do in the next few days?
yoyo, when you got a min if you can have Lianna add her flight info to her account
Definitely gotta remove the party package
And there's zero chance for like a cartel protection package for a refund right?
Or a way we can switch trips to somewhere else i had a friend that was suppose to be in Cancun this week but they got switched to Jamaica
Theres not really such package bro I'm not sure what that would even be
And yea at this point the trip is locked in and confirmed. If you want to plan a new trip we def can look at that but it wouldnt be like a swap / transfer
I def understand the concern, I will say tho bro we have travelers and on site staff out there now, chillin having a good time
Some groups trips just finished up today and yesterday
Side note bro I was forwarded your voicemail this morning, did you want to sched a call?
That was before I texted u
Oh bet. So just to make sure, 100% take the party pass off your account?
Yeah if I get the 300 back
No one else is allowed to leave
word I'll put that request in rn wit that that reasoning
it was $210 for the party pass
safe travels today fam. turn up this week
